'''Jordan Lilley''' (born 4 September 1996) is an English professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|so}} or {{rlp|sh}} for the [[Sheffield Eagles]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]].

He spent on loan from the [[Leeds Rhinos]] at [[Bradford Bulls|Bradford]] during the 2019 season.

==Background==
Lilley was born in [[Bramley, Leeds]], West Yorkshire, England.

==Career==
===Early career===
Lilley started at the amateur club [[Stanningley|Stanningley ARLFC]].

===Leeds Rhinos===
Lilley made his début for Leeds in their [[Super League XX|2015 Super League]] match against [[Wakefield Trinity]] at [[Belle Vue (Wakefield)|Belle Vue]]. He went on to make a handful of appearances in 2015 and just missed out on a spot in the Grand Final team at the end of the season.  In 2016 Lilley became a regular in the Leeds team after [[Danny McGuire]] was injured at the start of the season.{{citation needed|date=March 2024}}

====Hunslet====
Lilley was dual registered in 2015 with [[Hunslet R.L.F.C.|Hunslet Hawks]] in the [[Championship (rugby league)|Championship]], and played four games for the club, kicking ten goals.{{citation needed|date=March 2024}}

====Bradford Bulls====
He joined Bradford on a loan deal in February 2017.{{citation needed|date=March 2024}}

====Leigh Centurions====
In March 2018 Lilley joined [[Leigh Centurions|Leigh]] on a month loan.<ref>{{Cite news |url=https://www.newspapers.com/article/leigh-journal-higham-is-sore-but-glad-to/150015182/ |title=Higham is sore but glad to be back playing |newspaper=Leigh Journal |page=Main-47 |date=2018-03-08 |access-date=2024-06-24 |via=Newspapers.com}}</ref>

===Bradford Bulls===
He rejoined Bradford on a year and a half loan deal before signing permanently on a two-year deal midway through the 2019 season.{{citation needed|date=March 2024}}

===Sheffield Eagles===
On 22 October 2025 it was reported that he had signed a 2-year deal to join [[Sheffield Eagles]] in the [[RFL Championship]]<ref>{{cite web|website=Total RL|date=22 Oct 2025|author=Stephen Ibbetson|title=Jordan Lilley joins Sheffield Eagles after leaving Bradford Bulls|url=https://www.totalrl.com/jordan-lilley-joins-sheffield-eagles-after-leaving-bradford-bulls/}}</ref>
